@sectionDescription: Edit multiple buildable parcels stored in the current save.
@optionDescription:EnableVanillaMapTileC: Temporarily unlocks vanilla unpurchased map tiles covered by active custom parcels. Enabled by default; disabling it lets vanilla city limits keep blocking construction.
@optionDescription:ShowVanillaUnlockedMa: Shows vanilla MapTile dashed borders. Turning this off hides vanilla unlocked tile borders while keeping custom parcel borders visible.
@optionDescription:ParcelBoundaryRed: Red channel for the custom parcel border color, from 0 to 255.
@optionDescription:ParcelBoundaryGreen: Green channel for the custom parcel border color, from 0 to 255.
@optionDescription:ParcelBoundaryBlue: Blue channel for the custom parcel border color, from 0 to 255.
@optionDescription:ParcelBoundaryOpacity: Opacity percentage for custom parcel border lines.
@optionDescription:ParcelFillOpacity: Opacity percentage for custom parcel interior fill.
@optionDescription:ParcelBoundaryWidth: Line width for custom parcel borders.
@optionDescription:ToggleEditMode: Turns custom parcel editing on or off.
@bindingDescription:ToggleParcelEditMode: Turns custom parcel editing on or off.
@optionDescription:MoveNorth: Moves the selected parcel one step north.
@bindingDescription:MoveParcelNorth: Moves the selected parcel one step north.
@optionDescription:MoveSouth: Moves the selected parcel one step south.
@bindingDescription:MoveParcelSouth: Moves the selected parcel one step south.
@optionDescription:MoveWest: Moves the selected parcel one step west.
@bindingDescription:MoveParcelWest: Moves the selected parcel one step west.
@optionDescription:MoveEast: Moves the selected parcel one step east.
@bindingDescription:MoveParcelEast: Moves the selected parcel one step east.
@optionDescription:Grow: Expands the selected parcel outward from its center.
@bindingDescription:GrowParcel: Expands the selected parcel outward from its center.
@optionDescription:Shrink: Shrinks the selected parcel inward toward its center.
@bindingDescription:ShrinkParcel: Shrinks the selected parcel inward toward its center.
